skill_execution.question: Who set the fastest lap in qualifying for Saudi Arabia?

sql:
WITH LatestQualifyingSession AS (
    SELECT
        session_key,
        event_name,
        season,
        session_type
    FROM
        f1_data_library_DS.telemetry
    WHERE
        event_name = 'Saudi Arabian Grand Prix'
        AND session_type = 'Q'
        AND season = 2024
    ORDER BY
        date DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    dn.full_name,
    dn.driver_code,
    FORMAT("%02d:%02d.%03d",
        CAST(FLOOR(t.lap_time_sec / 60) AS INT64),
        CAST(FLOOR(MOD(CAST(t.lap_time_sec AS NUMERIC), 60)) AS INT64),
        CAST(MOD(CAST(t.lap_time_sec * 1000 AS INT64), 1000) AS INT64)
    ) AS formatted_lap_time
FROM
    f1_data_library_DS.telemetry AS t
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_driver_number_mapping AS dn
    ON t.driver_number = CAST(dn.driver_number AS STRING) AND t.season = dn.season
JOIN
    LatestQualifyingSession AS lqs
    ON t.session_key = lqs.session_key
WHERE
    t.event_name = lqs.event_name
    AND t.session_type = lqs.session_type
    AND t.season = lqs.season
ORDER BY
    t.lap_time_sec ASC
LIMIT 1
